overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a spaceship navigating through a dense asteroid field and derelict structures in deep space. The ship exits a narrow industrial corridor into open space with a large ringed planet visible, then maneuvers through debris fields and ruined space stations.

events.description: spaceship approaches and exits the narrow corridor into open space

agents.ego_description: piloting the spaceship through a narrow industrial corridor with metal walls

entered.detail: rusted industrial metal walls with pipes and structural girders
large cylindrical pipes running along the corridor walls
dark metal ceiling with exposed beams and framework

segments.scene_description: The spaceship flies through a narrow, enclosed industrial corridor with metal walls and pipes. The lighting is artificial and dim, with the ship's thrusters providing blue illumination. The corridor opens ahead as the ship approaches the exit to space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open space with ringed planet and debris field

events.description: exits enclosed corridor into vast open space with large ringed planet visible
enters dense asteroid field with debris surrounding the flight path

agents.ego_description: flying the spaceship out of the structure into open space, approaching a dense asteroid field with a large planet on the left

entered.detail: massive planet with visible atmosphere and ring system illuminated by distant star
dense field of floating rocky debris and small asteroids
orange and brown gaseous nebula clouds in the background

segments.scene_description: The spaceship emerges from the corridor into the vastness of space, revealing a stunning view of a large ringed planet on the left. The ship enters a dense asteroid field with debris floating all around, while colorful nebula clouds fill the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense asteroid field with derelict space structures

events.description: ship banks sharply left and right to navigate through tight clusters of large asteroids
passes large derelict space station structures and metal debris fields

agents.ego_description: maneuvering the spaceship through dense asteroid fields, weaving between massive rocks and derelict structures

notable_agents.action: distant ship or drone with blue lights visible briefly in the debris field

entered.detail: large ruined space station components with glowing orange lights and metal frameworks
massive rocky asteroids surrounding the flight path on all sides

segments.scene_description: The spaceship navigates through extremely dense asteroid fields, banking sharply to avoid massive rocks. Large derelict space station structures appear on the right, with the ship weaving through tight spaces between debris. The planet is temporarily out of view as the ship maneuvers through the dense field.

scene_state.functional_zone: open deep space with sparse debris

events.description: debris field thins out significantly as ship enters clearer space with planet visible again

agents.ego_description: flying through clearer space with minimal debris, maintaining course with the ringed planet visible on the left

entered.detail: edge of the massive planet reappears on the left side of the frame

segments.scene_description: The spaceship exits the dense debris field into clearer open space. The ringed planet becomes visible again on the left, while sparse asteroids float in the distance. The ship continues its journey through the vastness of space with the nebula-filled backdrop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a spaceship travels from a claustrophobic industrial interior into the expansive, debris-strewn reaches of deep space. It begins within a narrow corridor of dim metal walls and pipes, illuminated by the blue glow of thrusters, before the ship accelerates toward a brightening exit. As the vessel emerges into the void, the scene opens to reveal a massive ringed planet and vibrant nebula clouds, quickly transitioning into a dense asteroid field where the ship banks sharply to avoid massive rocks. The camera then weaves through the tight gaps of derelict space station structures, momentarily obscuring the planet as the debris becomes most concentrated. Finally, the ship breaks free from the wreckage into clearer open space, where the ringed planet reappears on the left against the colorful backdrop of the distant nebula.
